title: SlotnMeet
description: An AI-powered scheduling platform — like Calendly but smarter. Create events with just a prompt, get AI insights on your dashboard, and connect with Google Meet, Zoom, and Stripe Connect for paid bookings. Currently in development.

title: Willowave: Sound Hypnosis
description: Built the entire app ecosystem from scratch — from UI to deployment. Developed a custom native audio engine for both iOS and Android to deliver a seamless sound hypnosis experience.

title: Willowave Admin Panel
description: Full admin dashboard to manage the Willowave app — controlling content, users, and all app operations from a centralized web panel.

title: Slim Simple AI
description: Replaced the existing paywall with Apple's native paywall integration and resolved issues with the Apple developer team for smoother app review and deployment.

title: Alien Fitness
description: A balanced platform for nutrition, fitness, personal training, and mental health. Managed the software team operations to deliver a quality product.

title: TestNow
description: Mobile application for Android & iOS enabling AI-powered on-demand exams at scale. Built for Wheebox (ETS Assessment Services), it allows academic and higher education institutions to conduct online assessments with powerful features bundled into a mobile experience.

title: me@Walmart
description: Served as an indirect React Native engineer, contributing to the app architecture — specifically telemetry log structure and state management with Zustand to optimize FPS performance when the register handles large item volumes.
